actions.dialog_text: Hello everyone, is there anything specific you need help with regarding the programming assignment?
actions.plan: I should check in with the students here to see if they have any questions about the upcoming programming project.

actions.dialog_text: Marcus, do you have any questions about the programming assignment or need any clarification?
actions.plan: Marcus might have some questions about the project or need guidance. I should approach him directly to offer help.

actions.dialog_text: Everyone, we need to find a safe place to hide now.
actions.plan: I just heard a gunshot. The shooter might be nearby. I need to prioritize safety and find a hiding spot immediately.
I am currently safe behind the cafe bar counter. It is best to stay still and quiet to avoid detection by the shooter. I should remain alert and wait for further developments.

memories.description: I greeted the students in the cafeteria and offered assistance with their programming assignment to support their learning.
I decided to approach Marcus Johnson to offer direct assistance with the programming assignment, aiming to clarify any doubts he might have.
I heard a loud gunshot indicating an active shooter in the building. I decided to warn others quietly and sprint to hide behind the cafe bar counter for safety.
I found a hiding spot behind the cafe bar counter and decided to stay still and silent to avoid detection by the shooter located at the entrance hall.
